name: storytrail-ai
description: Don't Just Visit Places. Live Their Stories.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/server
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=apps/web && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/server
